message:
chore(deps): Upgrade thiserror to v2 and fix clap imports

Dependency updates and API fixes:

- Upgrade thiserror from v1 to v2 across all crates
- Fix clap imports: ValueSource moved to clap::parser module
- Add FromArgMatches import for command parsing
- Update signature handling for new API
- Fix test assertions for updated error formats
- Refresh Cargo.lock with updated dependencies

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
